raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Organization for Social Media Safety has made social media platforms safer for everyone through innovative programs and services.",
    "Social media-motivated violence, defined as attacks committed for the purpose of being filmed and distributed on social media to gain internet notoriety, has been reported to double every year.",
    "Jordan's Law is the nation's first state law aimed at deterring social media-motivated violence.",
    "The Organization for Social Media Safety works to prevent and deter social media-related cyberbullying, violence, human trafficking, harassment, and hate speech.",
    "The technology development facilitated by the Organization for Social Media Safety is part of their strategy to improve safety on social media platforms.",
    "The Social Media Transparency and Accountability Act of 2021 would require social media platforms to publicly disclose their content moderation policies.",
    "The Social Media Transparency and Accountability Act of 2021 aims to enhance transparency and accountability concerning the amplification of extreme and dangerous content by social media platforms."
  ]
}
```
